title: Request to Update Email Address / Login Username
description: Steps for customers to reset their password and update email address or login username through the rainGO app.

content.overview: Customer Request: Customer is requesting to update registered email address or change login username through the rainGO app's action station interface.
content.complianceNotice: ⚠️ Security & Compliance Notice (POPIA): Due to POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act) compliance, we are not allowed to directly update or change email addresses or login usernames on behalf of the customer. Instead, we must verify ownership and guide the customer through a secure self-service process.
agentActionSteps: Step 1: Greet customer and acknowledge their request
Step 2: Verify customer identity and account ownership
Step 3: Direct customer to the action station
Step 4: Guide them to select Reset Username or email update option
Step 5: Ensure customer receives reset link successfully
Step 6: Confirm customer can access self-service portal
Step 7: Provide support contact if customer encounters issues

processFlow.description: Option to reset account password securely
Send secure link to update username
Verify and confirm all changes made

keyPoints: Always verify customer identity before proceeding
Send reset link via registered email
Customer must complete reset within 24 hours
Email address must be unique in system

title: Order Management
description: Complete guide for handling order-related enquiries including new service orders, order statuses, delivery updates, cancellations, returns, and RICA-related delivery issues.

content.overview: This comprehensive guide covers all aspects of order management from order creation to delivery and returns handling.

sections.title: Order Statuses
items: Cancelled: Order cancelled by customer or system

sections.title: RICA Delivery Issues
items: RICA (Regulation of Interception of Communications Act) compliance required

keyPoints: Always verify customer details before proceeding
Keep customer informed at all times

title: Promise to Pay
description: Complete procedure for handling billing and payment options concerns including payment arrangements and missed payments.

content.overview: Guide for agents to set up payment arrangements with customers who need flexible payment options or have arrears.

sections.title: Payment Arrangement Eligibility
items: Customer account must be in good standing initially
Customer must have no more than 2 missed promises

sections.title: Setting Up a Promise to Pay
items: Step 1: Verify customer identity and account
Step 2: Discuss payment difficulties with customer
Step 3: Review account balance and history
Step 5: Agree on payment dates and amounts

sections.title: Payment Options Available
items: Lump sum payment: One-time full settlement
Split payments: Divide balance into 2-3 payments
Installment plan: Monthly payments over period
Automatic debit order: Automated recurring payments

sections.title: Managing Payment Arrangements
items: Follow up on missed payments immediately
Review arrangement terms if customer struggles

sections.title: Failed Promise to Pay
items: Consider suspension of services if applicable

keyPoints: Always treat customers with respect and empathy
Be clear about consequences of non-payment

title: Migration Order
description: Complete guide for migration orders created when customers upgrade or downgrade their current service or subscription.

content.overview: Migration orders are created when an existing customer upgrades or downgrades their current service or subscription. This guide covers the complete migration process.

sections.title: Understanding Migration
items: Upgrade: Customer moves to higher tier service
Downgrade: Customer moves to lower tier service
Lateral move: Customer changes to different plan at same tier
Service replacement: Customer switches service type
All changes processed through migration order system

sections.title: Pre-Migration Steps
items: Step 1: Review current service and contract terms
Step 3: Discuss pricing and contract changes

sections.title: Migration Issues & Troubleshooting
items: Service interruption: Escalate to technical team

sections.title: Post-Migration
items: Send welcome information for new service

keyPoints: Always confirm customer wishes before processing
Maintain service during migration if possible

title: Simple Troubleshooting Steps
description: Step-by-step process to troubleshoot customer reports of slow speeds, unstable connection, or no connectivity on the 5G service.

content.overview: This troubleshooting guide helps agents systematically diagnose and resolve common 5G connectivity and speed issues.

sections.title: Initial Customer Assessment
items: Confirm if issue is constant or intermittent
Ask what customer has already tried

sections.title: Step 1: Check Account Status
sections.description: Verify customer account and service status
items: Check if account is active and in good standing
Verify if customer is on a high-speed data plan
Confirm no service suspension or limitations
Check account balance and payment status
Review account for any flags or holds
Action: If account issues found, resolve before continuing

sections.title: Step 2: Check Device Online/Offline Status
items: Verify device is connected to network
Action: Ask customer to restart device if no signal

sections.title: Step 3: Check Site Connection Status
sections.description: Determine if customer is on correct site
items: Verify customer is on their regular site
Check if customer has traveled to different location
Verify 5G site status and any outages
Action: Guide customer to appropriate coverage area if needed

sections.title: Step 4: Check Speed Performance
items: Ask customer to run speed test on device
Compare result to expected speeds for plan
Check for background apps using bandwidth
Verify no large downloads or updates running
Action: Investigate if speeds significantly below plan

sections.title: Step 5: Check WiFi Connection Type
items: Check signal strength for selected band
Suggest optimal band for location (2.4GHz = range, 5GHz = speed)
Check other devices on same network
Action: Switch bands if experiencing poor performance

keyPoints: Document all findings and actions taken
Escalate if issue persists after all steps

title: Troubleshooting Guide - Validate Account & Service
description: Advanced step-by-step troubleshooting guide for agents to identify and resolve customer connectivity issues on 5G service.

content.overview: In-depth troubleshooting for more complex 5G connectivity issues, focusing on account and service validation.

sections.title: 1. Validate Account & Service - Basic Check
sections.description: Perform initial account and service validation
items: ✓ Confirm customer address of use is correct and updated on system
✓ Verify service policy is active (must be on High Speed)
✓ Check for blank policy or policy showing '--' (escalate immediately)
✓ Review for any service restrictions or limitations
Action: Resolve any account issues before proceeding to technical troubleshooting

sections.title: 2. Check Active Alarms & Outages
sections.description: Verify no active network issues affecting customer
items: ✓ Check for active alarms on nearby 5G sites
✓ Review escalation tickets for same area
Action: If outage found, provide estimated time to resolution

sections.title: 3. Service Policy Verification
sections.description: Ensure customer has correct service plan
items: ✓ Confirm policy type matches customer expectations
✓ Check policy tier (Basic, Standard, Premium, etc.)
✓ Verify data allowance and speed limits
✓ Review any caps or throttling settings
Action: Upgrade plan if needed, or explain current limitations

sections.title: 4. Device Compatibility Check
items: ✓ Check firmware/software is up to date
✓ Verify device is on approved list
✓ Check for known issues with device model
✓ Ensure SIM card is provisioned for 5G
Action: Recommend compatible device if needed

sections.title: 5. Network Connection Troubleshooting
items: Action: If only works in specific area, site-specific issue

sections.title: 6. Performance Testing
items: ✓ Run speed test and document results
✓ Compare to expected speeds for plan
Action: If below plan minimums, escalate to technical team

sections.title: 8. Escalation Criteria
sections.description: When to escalate to technical team
items: ✗ Issue persists after all troubleshooting steps
✗ Complete loss of signal in customer location
✗ Multiple areas affected (not just customer location)

keyPoints: Validate account first before technical troubleshooting
